name: a2ui_seed_agent
description: A2UI Seed Agent demonstrating dynamic widgets, custom interactive Leaflet overlays, Vega charts, organization networks, and WAV audio podcast briefings.

skills.name: Standard A2UI Components Showcase
skills.description: Renders and displays native A2UI standard components like Tabs, Modals, TextFields, CheckBoxes, MultipleChoices, and Sliders.

skills.name: High-Fidelity Geographic Map Overlays
skills.description: Generates and layers density heatmaps, pulsing radar markers, animated polylines, and toggle layers dynamically.

skills.name: Universal Metric Dashboard and Graphs
skills.description: Visualizes org hierarchy network graphs, interactive sliders, KPI cards, and Vega-Lite graphs.

skills.name: Transcoded Speech WAV Summarizer
skills.description: Synthesizes 150-word briefings seekable natively in browser players.
